gloss: long ago, for a long time
strawberry (cf. berry marjô; the cultivated kind)
cream-filled pastry (Belgian import); (by extension) any donut or filled sweet dough
the lead, front position (in a race or contest) (late-stratum)
to converse, speak back and forth
to fall, drop (of prices, water, level)
to lower, bring down (causative of langô)
go on, go ahead, let’s do it
to set (of the sun); to sink
market (Low German trade-word; cf. turg "market square")
just now, soon, in a bit
fine, all right, so be it
percent (formal term; per hundred, the hundred a full gross)
medicine, medication (cf. rohô "grass"; the healing-herb sense)
beach, waterfront (the newer, nautical word; cf. rānd)
to affect, have effect on (Low German)
to bustle, make street noise (Marīsô, slav)
